markdownRemark.html:
Hi! This is my new blog, created with Gatsby framework since it fits my requirements, only need to setup the config and stuff and you are good to go, cool! Also the template is from Abhay Nikam and a bit of adjustment here and there to suit my taste. You guys can check it out on his repo here.

So, I am a 26 yo christian, software engineer, football lover, casual gamer, youtube geek, wanna-be book lover. Will try to update this with my random thought!
